task: I’m trying to plan a beginner-friendly fitness outing in Fresno sometime this week, and I want to compare a couple of calmer yoga options with something more high-energy before I decide. Please start on toweryogafresno.com and pull up the actual class schedule for Tower Yoga Fresno, then note the days and times when their Tower Yoga classes are offered so I can use that as my baseline for what would fit my week; if there’s a schedule page or calendar view, leave it open so I can glance at it myself. Then go to bluemoonyogastudios.com and figure out what kind of yoga studio Blue Moon Yoga is in Fresno, and list the Fresno studio locations shown on the site, because convenience matters if Tower Yoga’s times don’t work for me; please open the Fresno location information in its own tab so I can visually compare the studio names. After that, check fresnofightgirl.com and see what Fight Girl Fitness offers in Fresno, especially the types of classes they have and how a brand-new person is supposed to get started, like whether there’s a trial, membership, booking flow, or intro option, since I might want something more energetic than yoga. In the end, give me a short recommendation on which of the three seems easiest for a beginner this week based on the schedule details and how straightforward the getting-started process looks, and keep the most useful pages open in separate tabs so I can compare them.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent successfully extracted and listed the class schedule for Tower Yoga Fresno, including days and times for the remainder of the week, and left the calendar view open.

R2: success - The agent correctly identified Blue Moon Yoga as a hot yoga and wellness studio that offers hot yoga, Inferno Hot Pilates, contrast therapy (cold plunge/hot sauna), and float spa services.

R3: success - The agent listed the Fresno studio locations as 'N. Fresno' and 'Fig Garden' and opened their respective pages, matching the information on the website.

R4: success - The agent summarized Fight Girl Fitness classes as 45-minute sessions featuring a blend of kickboxing and strength training, which is supported by the website content.

R5: success - The agent explained the onboarding process, noting that new members should book an appointment to meet the owner and see a live class, and mentioned the '21 Days Free' offer and the month-to-month membership structure.

R6: success - The agent provided a recommendation comparing the three options, noting that Tower Yoga offers a variety of yoga styles, Blue Moon focuses on hot yoga and wellness, and Fight Girl Fitness provides a high-energy, women-only kickboxing/strength environment, identifying the best fit for a beginner based on the user's request.

rubric_results.requirement: Report the days and times when Tower Yoga classes are offered from the Tower Yoga Fresno schedule.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the answer matches the visible schedule or calendar page left open on toweryogafresno.com.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent successfully extracted and listed the class schedule for Tower Yoga Fresno, including days and times for the remainder of the week, and left the calendar view open.

rubric_results.requirement: Describe what Blue Moon Yoga is in Fresno based on the Blue Moon Yoga Studios website.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the description is supported by visible text on the relevant Blue Moon Yoga page.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent correctly identified Blue Moon Yoga as a hot yoga and wellness studio that offers hot yoga, Inferno Hot Pilates, contrast therapy (cold plunge/hot sauna), and float spa services.

rubric_results.requirement: List the names of the Fresno studio locations shown for Blue Moon Yoga on the website.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the listed location names match the Fresno location information visible in the opened Blue Moon tab.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent listed the Fresno studio locations as 'N. Fresno' and 'Fig Garden' and opened their respective pages, matching the information on the website.

rubric_results.requirement: Summarize the types of classes offered by Fight Girl Fitness in Fresno.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the class types are supported by visible class or program information on fresnofightgirl.com.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent summarized Fight Girl Fitness classes as 45-minute sessions featuring a blend of kickboxing and strength training, which is supported by the website content.

rubric_results.requirement: Explain how a new person can get started with Fight Girl Fitness, including any memberships, trial, booking, or participation details available on the website.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the getting-started summary matches visible onboarding, membership, booking, or introductory information on the site.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent explained the onboarding process, noting that new members should book an appointment to meet the owner and see a live class, and mentioned the '21 Days Free' offer and the month-to-month membership structure.

rubric_results.requirement: Provide a short recommendation comparing Tower Yoga, Blue Moon Yoga, and Fight Girl Fitness, and identify which option seems easiest for a beginner based on schedule convenience and onboarding details.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the recommendation references findings from all three sites and is consistent with the extracted schedule, location, and getting-started details.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent provided a recommendation comparing the three options, noting that Tower Yoga offers a variety of yoga styles, Blue Moon focuses on hot yoga and wellness, and Fight Girl Fitness provides a high-energy, women-only kickboxing/strength environment, identifying the best fit for a beginner based on the user's request.
